name: Architext 1.7.2 Native Install + Self-Update
summary: Native install + self-update release: a shell installer and an architext update/upgrade command download checksum-verified binaries from GitHub releases, so npm becomes an optional bridge users can leave. Releases now attach per-platform binaries plus SHA256SUMS, and an Architext release notifies the roboticus-site repository to re-sync.
updateSource: Shipped to npm 2026-06-20. All six packages published at 1.7.2 and verified live; the release attaches the per-platform binaries + SHA256SUMS, and the roboticus-site release dispatch fired successfully (first live cross-repo trigger). The shipped 1.7.2 binary's update and --check-updates work against the live release API. Ships the native install + self-update off-ramp from npm (PR #229) and the dispatch (PR #230). First fully-green release run (the propagation-tolerant smoke held).

required.title: Native installer + architext update/upgrade
required.summary: install.sh (curl|sh) detects the platform, downloads the latest release binary, verifies its SHA-256, and installs to ~/.local/bin with no npm/Node. architext update (and the repurposed upgrade) self-updates the native binary from GitHub releases (download, checksum-verify, atomic in-place replace); a npm-managed install is migrated to a native one with off-ramp instructions instead of being overwritten. --check-updates reports availability. upgrade is no longer a sync alias.

required.title: Attach native binaries + checksums to releases
required.summary: The publish pipeline attaches the five per-platform binaries and a SHA256SUMS manifest to every GitHub release, giving the installer and architext update a verifiable download source independent of npm. The v1.7.1 release was backfilled so the installer works immediately.

required.title: Viewer header shows the product version
required.summary: The serve layer built AppState.cli_version from CARGO_PKG_VERSION (the crate's 0.0.0), so the viewer header read 'Architext / 0.0.0'. Use ARCHITEXT_VERSION (stamped from package.json by build.rs), matching architext --version.

workstreams.name: Off-npm native distribution
workstreams.summary: Make native install + self-update first-class so npm becomes a transitional bridge, with a comfortable off-ramp for existing users.

evidence.label: PR #229 native installer + architext update (off-ramp from npm)
